creator: shura0@yandex.ru
text:
I have laptop Asus X51RLseries and it has ATI Radeon Xpress 1100 video
card. When I run xorg by 'startx' command laptop freezes in most cases.
In 7.2 all worked well.

By 'freeze' I mention black display (backlight is off too) and laptop
does not listen keyboard and mouse. 'Power' button does not work too,
I can only off my laptop by long pressing of 'Power' button.

Sorry, but I can't provide xorg.0.log because after reboot log files
are empty.  I can collect information only with success runs of xorg.
I attach Xorg.0.log of last success run.

Port versions:

xorg-7.4_2          X.Org complete distribution metaport
xorg-apps-7.4_1     X.org apps meta-port
xorg-cf-files-1.0.2_3 X.org cf files for use with imake builds
xorg-docs-1.4,1     X.org documentation files
xorg-drivers-7.4_2  X.org drivers meta-port
xorg-fonts-100dpi-7.4 X.Org 100dpi bitmap fonts
xorg-fonts-7.4      X.org fonts meta-port
xorg-fonts-75dpi-7.4 X.Org 75dpi bitmap fonts
xorg-fonts-cyrillic-7.4 X.Org Cyrillic bitmap fonts
xorg-fonts-miscbitmaps-7.4 X.Org miscellaneous bitmap fonts
xorg-fonts-truetype-7.4 X.Org TrueType fonts
xorg-fonts-type1-7.4 X.Org Type1 fonts
xorg-libraries-7.4  X.org libraries meta-port
xorg-macros-1.2.1   X.Org development aclocal macros
xorg-server-1.6.1,1 X.Org X server and related programs

xf86-video-ati-6.12.4 X.Org ati display driver
xf86bigfontproto-1.1.2 XFree86-Bigfont extension headers
xf86dga-1.0.2_1     Test program for the XFree86-DGA extension
xf86dgaproto-2.0.3  XFree86-DGA extension headers
xf86driproto-2.0.4  XFree86-DRI extension headers
xf86miscproto-0.9.2 XFree86-Misc extension headers

some fragments of /etc/X11/xorg.conf

Section "Extensions"
        Option "Composite" "False"
EndSection

Section "Module"
    Load        "dbe"   # Double buffer extension
    Load        "freetype"
    Load        "glx"
    Load        "dri"
EndSection

Section "DRI"
 Group        "video"
 Mode         0660
EndSection

Section "Device"
    Identifier  "Xpress 1100"
    Driver      "radeon"
    Option      "XAANoOffscreenPixmaps" "true"
    Option      "NoAccel"       "False"
    Option      "AccelDFS"      "True"
    Option      "AccelMethod"   "EXA"
    Option      "DMAForXv"      "True"
    Option      "DRI"           "True"
EndSection

Kernel is GENERIC, I've not recompiled it.
I can collect any further information what you need, please ask.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
